title: ascochilus calceolaris
intro: Ascochilus calceolaris, also known as the slipper orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Ascochilus calceolaris include its ability to boost the immune system, improve digestion, and reduce stress and anxiety. Ascochilus calceolaris can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
